steps.script: () => { const o={}; try { const t=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const html=document.documentElement.innerHTML.toLowerCase(); const meta=window.ShopifyAnalytics&&window.ShopifyAnalytics.meta; o.title=document.title; o.price=(document.querySelector('[class*="price"]')||{}).innerText||null; const atc=document.querySelector('button[name="add"], form[action*="/cart/add"] [type="submit"]'); if(atc){const r=atc.getBoundingClientRect(); o.atc={text:(atc.innerText||'').trim(),disabled:atc.disabled,top:Math.round(r.top),aboveFold:(r.top<innerHeight&&r.top>0)};} else {o.atc=null;} o.wallets=['.shopify-payment-button','[class*="apple-pay" i]','[class*="shop-pay" i]','[aria-label*="paypal" i]'].filter(s=>document.querySelector(s)); o.bnpl=['afterpay','klarna','affirm','shop pay installments','pay in 4','4 payments'].filter(x=>html.includes(x)); o.intl=['aud','a$','australia','duties','customs','import'].filter(x=>t.includes(x)); o.usReassure=['ships from','free shipping','free returns','2 day','within 2'].filter(x=>t.includes(x)); o.firstPiecePromise=t.includes('first piece promise')||t.includes('first dress promise'); o.pixels={fbq:!!window.fbq,pintrk:!!window.pintrk,clarity:!!window.clarity,klaviyo:!!(window.klaviyo||window._learnq)}; o.variantId=((meta&&meta.product&&meta.product.variants&&(meta.product.variants.find(v=>v.available)||meta.product.variants[0]))||{}).id||null; } catch(e){o.error=String(e);} return o; }

() => { try { const m=window.ShopifyAnalytics.meta.product; const v=(m.variants.find(x=>x.available)||m.variants[0]).id; const xhr=new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST','/cart/add.js',false); xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type','application/json'); xhr.send(JSON.stringify({items:[{id:v,quantity:1}]})); return {added:v,status:xhr.status,resp:xhr.responseText.slice(0,120)}; } catch(e){ return {error:String(e)}; } }

() => { const t=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const html=document.documentElement.innerHTML.toLowerCase(); return { subtotalText:(document.querySelector('[class*="subtotal" i], [class*="total" i]')||{}).innerText||null, shipping:['free shipping','free returns','ships','2 day','within 2','shipping calculated'].filter(x=>t.includes(x)), duties:['duties','customs','import'].filter(x=>t.includes(x)), wallets:['.shopify-payment-button','[class*="apple-pay" i]','[class*="shop-pay" i]','[aria-label*="paypal" i]','[data-shopify="dynamic-checkout-cart"]'].filter(s=>document.querySelector(s)), bnpl:['afterpay','klarna','affirm','pay in 4'].filter(x=>html.includes(x)), checkoutBtn:!!document.querySelector('[name="checkout"], [href*="/checkout" i]') }; }

() => { const t=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase(); const html=document.documentElement.innerHTML.toLowerCase(); return { url:location.href, reachedCheckout:/checkout/.test(location.href), challenge:/just a moment|verify you are human|checking your browser|captcha/.test(t), heading:(document.querySelector('h1,h2')||{}).innerText||null, shippingWords:['free shipping','shipping','delivery','2 day','duties','customs'].filter(x=>t.includes(x)), payMethods:['credit card','paypal','apple pay','google pay','shop pay','afterpay','klarna','affirm'].filter(x=>html.includes(x)), guest:/guest|continue as guest|no account|email/.test(t), emailField:!!document.querySelector('input[type="email"]'), phoneField:!!document.querySelector('input[type="tel"]') }; }
